name: libruby
title: libruby
description:
Libraries necessary to run Ruby
Ruby is the interpreted scripting language for quick and easy
object-oriented programming.  It has many features to process text
files and to do system management tasks (as in perl).  It is simple,
straight-forward, and extensible.
.
This package includes the 'libruby' library, necessary to run Ruby.
.
This package is a dependency package, which depends on Debian's default Ruby
version (currently v3.3).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libruby because Libraries necessary to run Ruby.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libruby as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libruby with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libruby --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
